---
title: "expfit"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{expfit}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
suppressMessages(library(ephys4))
```


```{r}
read_PATCHMASTER(ephysdata::examplefile("NaV"), ser=2) %>% tail(1) -> testdata

testdata %>% ggsweeps()
```


```{r}


testdata %>%
 add_cursor_expfit("expfit", 0.011, 0.03, annot=annot_range_model(range.color="skyblue", range.fill=alpha("skyblue", .1), line.color = "blue", line.width = 2)) -> EXPFIT

EXPFIT%>% ggsweeps() + cowplot::theme_cowplot()

```

```{r}
EXPFIT %>% select(expfit) %>% tidyr::unnest_wider(expfit, names_sep = "~")
```
